oneOf.description: dest path: relative -> repo, ~/ or absolute -> host

path.description: dest path: relative -> repo, ~/ or absolute -> host

writeType.description: how the rendered body lands: overwrite (default: header + body) | mergeUpsert (env KEY=VALUE union under the existing dest)

skipAutoGeneratedHeader.description: drop the autogen header on the overwrite path (dests whose format forbids comments)

renderReferencedFiles.description: inline @-includes into the rendered body (overwrite path)

writeType.description: how the rendered body lands: overwrite (default: header + body) | mergeUpsert (env KEY=VALUE union under the existing dest)

skipAutoGeneratedHeader.description: drop the autogen header on the overwrite path (dests whose format forbids comments)

renderReferencedFiles.description: inline @-includes into the rendered body (overwrite path)

options.description: when the profile runs: autoExec opts in to bare-che runs, execIf predicates must ALL pass

mixinProfiles.description: local profile names composed depth-first, in order

plugins.description: profiles loaded at their own checkout: `@<giturl>::<profile>` (remote) or `<dir>::<profile>` (local dir) string, or {ref, env}

Profile.description: one profile block: options self-describe eligibility, mixinProfiles compose in order, plugins pull remote profiles, include adds, exclude filters last and wins

execIf.description: predicate expressions `<source>` or `<source> == <literal>`, sources builtin:*/env:*; empty: always

autoExec.description: run on bare che (default false: runs only via --profile or mixinProfiles)

owner.description: dest owner user; empty: code default

ownerGroup.description: dest owner group; empty: code default

files.description: the group's items, each inheriting the group's perms

owner.description: dest owner user; empty: code default

ownerGroup.description: dest owner group; empty: code default

ctx.description: renderTemplates only: group-level template context, merged under each item's ctx (item keys win)

options.description: renderTemplates only: group-level render options, merged under each explicit dest's options (dest-set fields win)

files.description: the group's items, each inheriting the group's perms

copy.description: drop matching copy items (source or dest)

renderTemplates.description: drop matching template items (source or dest)

excludeSet.description: subtractive glob filter, applied last, wins over every include (rich entries too)

source.description: repo-relative source path, or remote ref @<repo>//<path>[?ref=<ref>] (renderTemplates only, explicit dest required)

dest.description: dest paths: relative -> repo, ~/ or absolute -> host; omitted -> derived from the root/ source path

ctx.description: renderTemplates only: values exposed as the template's root context (.key)

oneOf.description: one source fanned out to explicit dests

link.description: symlink-op entries, repo-relative under root/: glob string (dest derived 1:1) or {source, dest} sed-style rewrite

renderTemplates.description: *.tpl render-op perm-groups; sources repo-root-relative or remote (@<repo>//<path>[?ref=<ref>], explicit dest required), glob and derived-dest forms must be root/-prefixed

mkdirs.description: extra-dir perm-groups; each item one dir path (brace-expanded)

runScripts.description: script paths or globs, repo-relative, run in spec order

includeSet.description: additive payload: link globs, copy/renderTemplates/mkdirs perm-groups, script globs, service names

oneOf.description: glob over git-tracked files under root/ (brace-expanded), dest derived 1:1

source.description: file or glob, repo-relative under root/

dest.description: sed-style rewrite s/<pattern>/<replacement>/[g] (Go regexp, $1 backrefs; g: every match, absent: first only), applied to the repo-relative dest path before host mapping

oneOf.description: source file or glob with a sed-style dest rewrite

env.description: envs exported around everything done for the plugin's unit

title: che.yml
description: che spec: every top-level key defines a profile block
